selectedComponents.reason: riskLevel: critical + omissionPolicy: never + retainPolicy: safety_critical — hard protection; always included regardless of budget pressure

omittedComponents.reason: defaultAction: omit; no requiredWhen match; no safeToOmitWhen match; budget pressure (budgetCritical=true); Budgeter confirmed trim as candidate_optional

planningWarnings.message: budgetCritical=true: budget pressure observed; optional components reviewed for trimming by Budgeter
